name: MJ Harvest, Inc.
summary: MJ Harvest, Inc., a development stage company, develops, acquires, and distributes agricultural and horticultural tools and implements to growers and operators in the hemp and cannabis retail industry. It offers the DeBudder Lids and EDGE brands products, soil and soil additive products, and additional tools and implements used in the cultivation and harvesting of crops through distributors and its websites www.procannagro.com and www.weedfarmsupply.com. The company is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
